with open\('com/hereliesaz/aznavrail/AzNavRailScopeImpl.class', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)

import struct
strings = []
i = 8  # skip magic + version
const_count = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i:i+2]\)[0]
i += 2
for _ in range\(const_count - 1\):
    tag = data[i]
    if tag == 1:  # CONSTANT_Utf8
        length = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i+1:i+3]\)[0]
        s = data[i+3:i+3+length]
        try:
            decoded = s.decode\('utf-8'\)
            if any\(x in decoded for x in ['onClick', 'content', 'onFocus', 'param']\):
                print\(f"'{decoded[:100]}'"\)
        except:
            pass
        i += 3 + length
    elif tag in \(7,8,16,19,20\): i += 3
    elif tag in \(9,10,11,12,17,18\): i += 5
    elif tag in \(3,4,18\): i += 5
    elif tag in \(5,6\): i += 9; _ += 1  # consumes two slots
    elif tag == 15: i += 4
    else: 
        break
EOF)
